text:
*** Note that dependency audio/libmp3-archive-perl has been submitted as PR/148898.

MP3 Archive Tools is a set of tools to ease organising a collection of mp3 (and
other audio) files.

WWW:	http://erislabs.net/ianb/projects/mp3-archive-tools/
